summary: Intuit laid off 1,800 employees (10% of workforce) while announcing plans to hire 1,800 new employees for AI-focused roles, explicitly citing AI restructuring.
ceo_quote: We are reallocating resources to accelerate innovation in AI.

source.title: Intuit to lay off 1,800 employees, plans to rehire in AI roles

evidence.description: Official company announcement and CEO statement about AI restructuring.
